commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 02 Jul

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with the lowest Amihud measure (0.0013), reflecting minimal price impact per million traded. Nasdaq 100 follows closely, though its Roll spread widens to 2.00%, suggesting slightly thicker implicit costs. LSE ranks fifth despite competitive roll spreads, hampered by elevated Amihud illiquidity (0.1624)—125 times higher than NYSE. This divergence indicates LSE faces deeper market depth challenges despite efficient bid-ask mechanics.
